# Neon Bounce Dash

> Tap to bounce and avoid obstacles!

## How to Play

Tap the screen to make the ball bounce over obstacles.

## About

**Theme**: retro neon city
**Target Session**: ~60 seconds
**Audience**: Casual gamers aged 12-45

Instant play and addictive high score competition for easy social sharing.

## Play Online

Deploy to GitHub Pages to get a live URL.

## Built With

- [Phaser 3](https://phaser.io/) — HTML5 game framework
- Pure JavaScript — no build step required
- PWA ready — works offline after first load
